items.description: Tiny isolated dark speck approximately 1 mm in diameter.
items.scholarly_note: Insignificant post-production debris; no paleographic value.

items.description: Light soiling and minor fiber abrasion along the outer edge of the leaf.
Corner rounded with slight surface wear and loss of paper fibers.
items.scholarly_note: Typical age- and use-related wear for the codex.

damage_notes: Minor edge wear and soiling along right fore-edge.
Slight rounding and abrasion at bottom-right corner.
No significant surface scratches, creases, or tears in the main field of the leaf.
summary: Folio 3 is blank with no text, marginalia, doodles, pen trials, or corrections. Only a single insignificant speck and minor edge/corner wear from handling and age are present.
